reviews.review_description:
What a great game. I tought the existing Tetris game on the quest was very well done amd this is even better since it's in 3D. The controls need some getting used to and it's wonderful how one can zoom in and zoom out or rotate the game. MR is also great and very relaxing!

I hope the developers keep making the game even better, expand the options and add many more levels!

Well done!

Bombastic haptics and audio. The game is fun, and challenging, I like the light up effect at the end of levels, the physics and the intro animation (after tutorial) very much. 


Controls take some getting used to and I would enjoy it if the basic blocks had a bit more visual appeal like texture/shine/ glow.

 Overall a great game ! I really got lost in it. Lots of shovel ware out with similar concept but we can feel that this one has soul. Congrats !

The game is already enjoyable and fun to play, but there is still room for improvement. Here are my suggestions:

(1) The controls are currently not very intuitive and feel a bit complicated. I suggest creating several control schemes. The default scheme I suggest should be the following: the left controller controls only the Playbox, and the right controller controls only the blox. This feels logical to me.

Playbox controls: Move the Playbox — Left Grip + hand movement (left/right, forward/backward, up/down). Scale the Playbox — Left Trigger + hand movement (up/down). Rotate the Playbox — Left Stick (left/right).
Blox controls: Move blox — Right Grip + hand movement (left/right, forward/backward). Rotate blox — Right Stick (left/right, up/down). Quick drop — Right Trigger.

(2) The blox drop should not be an acceleration. It should be an instant "shot" because people like shooting. (Aim, fire!)

(3) Add special effects when blox land: smoke, steam, sparks, splashes, etc.

(4) Make the blox more beautiful: semi-transparent, glass-like, gemstone-like, water-drop-like... (The magic of this game is hidden in the beauty of the blox.)

(5) In VR mode, display some dynamic environment instead of a black background.

(6) In AR mode, make the blox cast colored light reflections into the real room based on their colors.

(7) In Campaign Mode, the difficulty increases too quickly, and new Playbox types are introduced too fast. It would be better to have at least three Playboxes of the same type and gameplay principle before moving on to a new one. Right when you finally understand how a particular Playbox works, the game immediately gives you a different one.

Thank you.

The controls were a bit confusing at first but it is worth the time to learn. If you die all the time because you accidentally press the drop down button, avoid using it 😂. 

Love how the blocks map/structure can be controlled to something taller than me or small as my hand.

The quests in this game are pretty unique and can be frustrating at times. Unique in how you have to destroy diamonds in various locations and in 3D the map/space can get tricky to see , and frustrating when the top opening, where they drop the blocks, can feel like a bottle neck. Like if you are not careful moving the next block after the previous one, the next block gets stuck at the top, and you are screwed. I managed to pass those levels by looking only at the bottom shadow of the blocks.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! I'm glad you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description: Just stuck at where it tells you how to move the square around.

developer_response.body:
Hey Cattszss,
This is the initial tutorial. First, you need to move the board to the ghost position. The next step is to rotate it. If you have any questions or encounter any issues, feel free to email me at bloxargame@gmail.com. I'll be happy to assist you with playing the game, and if there's a bug, your feedback will help me fix it.
Thanks a lot!

reviews.review_description: Fun but requires attention and concentration. The skill feels incredible to wield. I'm excited to try more puzzle.
This was a pleasant surprise, absolutely worth the asking price. If you played tetris connected, this is the next game to buy :)

I've been working on a similar game over the years, but I'm very bad at finishing anything. Now I won't have to do that because this is just perfect. It's amazing in every way.  It makes me oddly happy as there was very little chance I was going to finish the game I was working on.

The fact that it's in mixed reality is great. I just finished a 3X3 level. Only scored 956, but I know I can get that higher. Whenever the level ended and the stack exploded, it made me audibly gasp. So sleek and clean, and the movement's great.

Would right a longer review, but I'm compelled to jump right back in.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your enthusiasm for BloxAR! It's fantastic to hear it!

reviews.review_title: Outstanding use of AR for logical game!
reviews.review_description: Great and innovative use of AR mode for a great logical game. Recommend it to everyone.

I just got the game and have really enjoyed so far. Of course I would love to see more grid size options for games (maybe even a custom option to choose your own size). There is a frustrating issue where I accidentally scale the board when trying to rotate it, so maybe an option to lock the scale would be nice.

If you are fond of puzzles and Tetris in particular, this app is a must have.
I've played several VR Tetris, specially on PC, and this is one of the best made and enjoyable I've tried. Of course, is not as easy to move blocks on 3D as on flat game, but controls are well done. The MR aspect is great and I wonder how could change gameplay implementing handtracking (this is a suggestion for you, dev).
Great game, great gameplay and I'm just waiting for new modes and levels in future updates
Laid back relaxing puzzling. Escape your worries.
The 4x4 is so fun. Now trying 3x3.

reviews.review_title: Awesome example of mixed reality fun!
reviews.review_description:
**NEW AGE TECH MEETS RETRO FUN**

**Introduction:**
- BloxAR is effectivly Tetris style gameplay in your own 3D space using mixed reality passthrough, featuring infinite play on various different size playing fields .

**Gameplay:**
 - controls are explained upon launch and feel very intuitive however as the pressure builds I found myself pressing the incorrect buttons in panic aha.
- options for both mixed reality passthrough gameplay or abyss style gaming.

**Graphics and Immersion:**
- playing on a quest 2 so I cannot fully experience this app in all its glory like the colour passthrough of that on the quest 3 , however I must say that it is very smooth and awesome to have a little tower on a table in front of you or even a huge tower on the floor standing over you ! Incredibly impressive immersion as it's utilizing passthrough.


**Storyline and Narrative:**
- at this current moment I did not experience any form of storyline , discord suggests this may be added in future updates 


**Comfort and Motion Sickness:**
- perfect comfort and zero motion sickness as it's a static experience
**Replay Value:**
- infinite replay value just like tetris

**Performance and Technical Issues:**
- zero technical issues experienced , lovely performance, especially enjoy the physics simulation when your tower falls ! 

**Conclusion:**
- easy 5/5, if your looking for 3d Tetris look no further!

reviews.review_title: I want to play it... but...
reviews.review_description:
The controls are horrible. It's set up like a flat game you'd play on your TV, not an immersive vr game.

Edit: Would it be possible to add (1) the ability to grab the tower by hand in order to move and rotate its position in the play space.(2) a virtual representation of the shapes
That can be manipulated by hand, affecting its position and place in the tower.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your review! We understand that the controls can feel a bit challenging at first. BloxAR is designed for a 3D experience, which means you can rotate pieces along three axes—unlike traditional games like Tetris that only allow one-axis rotation. This extra dimension might take a little more time to master, but many players find that after about 10 minutes, the controls start to feel more natural and the game becomes much more enjoyable.

We really appreciate your feedback and hope you'll give it another try. Your input is important to us as we continue to improve the game. Happy gaming!

EDIT: Thanks for your suggestions! We really appreciate your ideas. The concept of being able to grab the tower by hand and having a virtual representation of the shapes is very interesting. Currently, our control scheme is designed around button inputs to maintain speed and competitiveness among players. Implementing a hand-grab system might affect that aspect of gameplay.

That said, these features could work really well in a new game mode, and we’re excited to explore possibilities for future updates. I’d love to hear more about your ideas—please feel free to email me at bloxargame@gmail.com!

Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This is a really fun AR puzzle game! Definitely worth a try!
Great game with an amazing dev who is always look for feedback.
